title: Responsive Image Gallery

statement.markdown:
Create a responsive image gallery that allows users to view multiple images in a grid layout.
The gallery should be able to handle images of varying sizes and aspect ratios.

constraints: The gallery should be built using HTML and CSS only.
The gallery should be responsive and work on different screen sizes.
The gallery should not use any JavaScript or external libraries.

starterCode.css:
/* TODO: make .grid a responsive image grid, e.g. using
   grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(200px, 1fr)); */

gradingCriteria.description: Gallery is built using HTML and CSS only.
Gallery is responsive and works on different screen sizes.
Gallery does not use any JavaScript or external libraries.
